choices.text: storage (permanent, ~20k gas SSTORE) / memory (temp, cheap) / calldata (read-only function input, cheapest). Use calldata for external inputs you won't modify.
Up to 3 indexed params = topics filterable off-chain. Non-indexed in data. Index fields you'll filter on (from, to, tokenId). Strings stored as keccak256 if indexed.

questions.explanation: Max 3 indexed params for off-chain filtering.

choices.text: Inherit OpenZeppelin: contract MyToken is ERC20, Ownable { constructor() ERC20("X","X") Ownable(msg.sender) {} }. Audited, conventional, safe. Never reimplement ERC standards.
Custom errors (0.8.4+): error InsufficientBalance(uint256, uint256); revert InsufficientBalance(have, need). ~24 bytes encoded vs. 200+ for strings; client decodes typed args.
Checks-Effects-Interactions (CEI): 1) require checks, 2) update state, 3) external call last. balances[msg.sender] -= amount BEFORE payable transfer. Reentrant attacker sees already-deducted state.
